description:
BoardGameGeek's official XMLAPI2 (https://boardgamegeek.com/xmlapi2), the
canonical database for board games, RPGs, and video games. Every endpoint
returns XML; the generated client normalizes it to JSON so --json/--select
and MCP tools work like any JSON API.

Authorization: as of 2025-07-02 BGG requires a registered application and an
Authorization: Bearer <token> header on every request (register at
https://boardgamegeek.com/applications, then create a token). Requests go to
boardgamegeek.com (no leading www).

Scope: read-only lookup across the BGG taste graph — search, full game/thing
detail with stats and rankings, the live "hot" list, user profiles, user game
collections, logged plays, families, and guilds. No write/mutating endpoints.

Quirk worth knowing: collection (and occasionally thing/plays) can answer with
HTTP 202 and a "your request is queued, retry shortly" body the first time a
large query is requested; repeat the call until the data is returned.

tools.name: collection_get
tools.description: A user's collection by login name. Filter with the 0/1 status flags (own, rated, played, wishlist, want, trade). `stats=1` adds per-game rating and rank. Large collections may answer with HTTP 202 the first time and need a retry. Required: username. Optional: subtype (default: boardgame), excludesubtype, own (plus 8 more). Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: stats
params.description: 1 = include rating and rank stats per item

params.name: modifiedsince
params.description: Only items changed since this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

tools.name: family_get
tools.description: A BGG family (a shared series, theme, or IP grouping related things) by id. Comma-separate ids for a batch lookup. Required: id. Optional: type. Returns the Xmlresponse.

tools.name: guild_get
tools.description: A BGG guild by id. Set `members=1` to include the member roster (paginated with `page`). Required: id. Optional: members, sort, page. Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: page
params.description: Member roster page (25 members per page)

tools.name: hot_get-items
tools.description: The live BoardGameGeek Hot list. `type` selects the ranking (boardgame is the default and most common). Optional: type (default: boardgame). Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: type
params.description: Hot list type: boardgame, rpg, videogame, boardgameperson, rpgperson, boardgamecompany, rpgcompany, videogamecompany.

tools.name: plays_get
tools.description: Logged play sessions. Provide `username` (a user's plays) or `id` (a game's plays). Filter by date range and paginate with `page`. Optional: username, id, type (plus 4 more). Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: username
params.description: BGG user login name (plays logged by this user)

params.name: id
params.description: Thing id (plays logged for this game)

params.name: type
params.description: Id type when `id` is set: thing or family

tools.name: searches_search-things
tools.description: Full-text search across the BGG database. Returns matching things (id, name, year). Narrow with `type` and set `exact=1` for exact-name matches. Required: query. Optional: type, exact.

params.name: type
params.description: Comma-separated thing types to include: boardgame, boardgameexpansion, boardgameaccessory, rpgitem, rpgissue, videogame.

tools.name: thing_get
tools.description: Full record for a game/expansion/accessory by id (comma-separate ids for a batch). Opt into extra sections with the 0/1 flags. `stats=1` adds the rating, rank, and ownership statistics most callers want. Required: id. Optional: type, stats, versions (plus 5 more). Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Thing id, or comma-separated ids for a batch lookup

params.name: type
params.description: Restrict to a thing type (e.g. boardgame, boardgameexpansion)

params.name: stats
params.description: 1 = include rating, rank, and ownership stats

tools.name: user_get
tools.description: Public profile for a BGG user by login name. Opt into buddies, guilds, and the user's personal hot/top lists with the 0/1 flags. Required: name. Optional: buddies, guilds, hot (plus 2 more). Returns the Xmlresponse.

params.name: domain
params.description: Restrict hot/top lists to a domain: boardgame, rpg, videogame
